notes: Helmet is a good start but the proxy endpoint is completely unauthenticated—anyone can use it to forward requests to the upstream API on your dime. CORS is wide open (no origin restriction). Path is concatenated directly into the upstream URL with no sanitization (SSRF risk). /health and /metrics expose internal state without auth. Dead code: VALIDATION_RULES.uuidRegex defined but never used, CONFIG.apiKey assigned but never referenced. Redundant rate limiting: custom isRateLimited() duplicates express-rate-limit on the same route. recordCircuitBreakerFailure() is called twice on non-401 upstream errors (once inside the while-loop catch re-throw, once in the outer catch). No fetch timeout (AbortController/signal missing)—upstream requests can hang indefinitely. No cache size limit or periodic cleanup—responseCache and requestHistory Maps grow unbounded (memory leak). parseInt on env vars has no NaN check. No trust proxy setting so req.ip is unreliable behind load balancers. Circuit breaker pattern is correctly implemented with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states. API key rotation retry loop is well structured. Graceful shutdown handling is proper.
